text:
Did you know the average person spends 1.5 YEARS on the toilet?

We built an app to make that time count.

Royal Throne - track your sessions, earn XP, compete in leagues, and find someone pooping at the same time as you.

Free. Open source. No data sold.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

You earn XP for going to work.
You earn XP for exercising.
You earn XP in video games.

But nobody gives you XP for pooping.

Until now.

Royal Throne: the poop tracker that rewards you.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

POV: You're on the toilet and someone else in the world is too.

Royal Throne matches you with a "poop buddy" in real-time so you can chat while you both handle business.

Yes, this is real. Yes, it's free.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Apps that track your sleep: normal
Apps that track your steps: normal
Apps that track your water: normal
Apps that track your poops: REVOLUTIONARY

Download Royal Throne. You're welcome.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Royal Throne collects ZERO personal data.

No email required.
No tracking.
No analytics.
No data selling.

Just you, your throne, and your stats.

Privacy-first poop tracking.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

My app has:
- Poop tracking with XP
- Real-time buddy matching
- Leagues & leaderboards
- Achievement system
- ML-powered predictions
- Zero budget marketing

I'm too broke to put it on the Play Store but the APK is free.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

I built an app that predicts when you'll need to poop.

It uses machine learning to analyze your patterns and sends you a notification 10 minutes before nature calls.

The future is here and it's sitting on a toilet.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Rank progression in Royal Throne:

1. Toilet Trainee
2. Bathroom Beginner
3. Lavatory Lord
4. Porcelain Prince
5. Throne Master
6. Royal Flusher
7. Porcelain Emperor

Where are you on the ladder?

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Features I couldn't afford to build but built anyway:

- Real-time WebSocket chat
- ML prediction engine
- Supabase backend
- React Native + Expo
- Gamification system
- League competitions

All open source. $0 budget.

https://github.com/muhammadhamx/Royal-Throne

The Play Store wants $25 to list my app.

I'm a developer from Pakistan and $25 feels like $25,000 right now.

So I'm distributing Royal Throne as a free APK instead. Because good apps shouldn't cost you to give away.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

What if your toilet time was actually productive?

Royal Throne turns every bathroom session into:
- XP gained
- Achievements unlocked
- Streaks maintained
- Buddies found
- Stats tracked

Your throne, your kingdom.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Ancient Romans used communal toilets as social gathering places.

We're bringing that energy back with Poop Buddies - real-time chat with someone else who's on the throne at the same time as you.

History repeats itself.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Open source poop tracker with:

- React Native + Expo
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Realtime)
- Zustand state management
- ML predictions
- WebSocket chat

Star it. Fork it. Contribute.

https://github.com/muhammadhamx/Royal-Throne

Most apps: "We value your privacy"
Also most apps: *sells your data to 47 companies*

Royal Throne: Anonymous by default. No email needed. No tracking. No analytics. Delete everything with one tap.

We actually mean it.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Every morning, millions of people sit on the throne with nothing to do.

What if they could:
- Track their session
- Earn XP
- Get matched with a poop buddy
- Compete in leagues

That's Royal Throne. Free forever.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Weekly recap from Royal Throne:

"You spent 47 minutes on the throne this week. Your average session was 6.7 minutes. You're on a 12-day streak. Your poop buddy sent you 3 messages."

Data you never knew you needed.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Astronauts use a $19 MILLION toilet on the ISS.

You can track yours for free.

Royal Throne - because every throne deserves respect.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

I'm a solo developer from Pakistan.
I have zero marketing budget.
I can't afford the Play Store fee.

But I built an app with:
- Real-time multiplayer
- ML predictions
- Full gamification
- WebSocket chat

If you like it, a star on GitHub means the world.

https://github.com/muhammadhamx/Royal-Throne

Create a league. Invite your friends. Compete to see who's the most consistent pooper.

Royal Throne has league competitions with custom names, emojis, and leaderboards.

Because everything is better as a competition.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Day 1 of Royal Throne: "This is silly"
Day 7: "I have a 7-day streak I can't break"
Day 30: "I'm a Lavatory Lord with 2,340 XP and my poop buddy just sent me a meme"

It's more addictive than you think.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/

Tech stack behind Royal Throne:

Frontend: React Native + Expo SDK 54
Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Realtime)
State: Zustand
Predictions: Custom ML engine
Auth: Anonymous + optional email
Cost: $0/month (Supabase free tier)

Full source: https://github.com/muhammadhamx/Royal-Throne
